query: SELECT id, name, slug, SUBSTRING(description, 1, 200) as desc_preview, LENGTH(description) as desc_len FROM products WHERE slug LIKE '%caspeer%' OR slug LIKE '%casper%' OR name LIKE '%Caspeer%' OR name LIKE '%Casper%' LIMIT 5;
